input.topic: Star Blizzard Callisto Group Spear-Phishing Campaign Targeting Government and Civil Society 2019-2023
input.notes: FSB-linked Russian advanced persistent threat actor (Star Blizzard / Callisto Group / SEABORGIUM / ColdRiver) conducting long-running spear-phishing campaign targeting government officials, politicians, journalists, think tanks, NGOs, and defense sector personnel across NATO member states and countries of strategic interest to Russia. Active 2019-2023+. Joint advisory by CISA, FBI, NSA, NCSC UK, NCSC Canada, NCSC New Zealand, GCSB (NZ), ASD/ACSC (AU), and FCDO (UK) confirmed attribution to FSB Centre 18. Campaign uses credential harvesting via EvilGinx-style adversary-in-the-middle phishing infrastructure. Distinct from existing corpus entries (Midnight Blizzard/SVR, Salt Typhoon/China) — this is an FSB/Star Blizzard-specific campaign with strong government attribution and multi-country joint advisory.
